name: @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js
description: Open CapTable Protocol DAML smart contracts with generated JavaScript bindings

scripts.publish:manifest: yarn codegen && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > generated/npm-manifest.txt
scripts.publish: yarn codegen && yarn build:ts && npm publish
scripts.publish:manifest: yarn codegen && yarn build:ts && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > generated/npm-manifest.txt

author: Fairmint
